info.english_meaning: to throw to  make something fly
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kAlayati - drAvayati ityarTaH  ' kAlayati - prerayati ' iti tattvaboDinI  dantopaGAtaM kAlayati ' hiMsArTAyAm ' (3.4.48) ityatra  ' kaleH kAlayati kzepe gatisaMKyAnayordvayoH  kalayet SabdasaMKyAnavizaye kalane Sapi ' (Slo. 155) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'Druvasya putro BagavAn kAlo lokaprakAlanaH' (hari॰1.3.39) praSabdaH prakarze prakalayati sADu saYcazwe Ayuriti kAlaH sa eva lokaprakAlanaH
'pravfdDamArujya mahIpraroham prakAlayanneva sa pArTivOGAn krudDo'ntakaH prARaBfto yaTEva' (BA॰Adi॰193.5) prakAlayan praRudannityarTaH
'prakAlyamAnastenAyaM SUlahastena rakzasA agnyagAraM prati dvAri mayA dorByAM nivAritaH' (BA॰vana॰137.7).. ukto'rTaH
'taM prakAlayEtA gA brahmabanDa ityabravIt' (CAM॰u॰18.2) iha prakAlanaM prAjanaM Bavati
'yajYe yajYe yaTAkAlaM dakziRA atyakAlayat' (BA0 droRa0 575) atyakAlayat=adadAt apodaharaditi SabdArTaH

'gAva utkAlitapuMskA bAhAya ca vikrayAya ca striya evAvaSizyante kaH punararhatyagrAmyARAM puMsa utkAlayituM ye grahItumaSakyAH kuta eva bAhAya ca vikrayAya ca' (pA0 1273 sUtre BAzyam) utkAlitapuMskAH=nizkAsitapumBAvAH
